name: coacd

about.summary: Approximate Convex Decomposition for 3D Meshes with Collision-Aware Concavity and Tree Search
Approximate Convex Decomposition for 3D Meshes with Collision-Aware Concavity and Tree Search

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: coacd
  version: "1.0.10"
  build_number: 0
  cdt_vendor_version: 1.4.4
  # Touch variables to help rattler-build create the variants.
  _fmt: ${{ fmt }}
  _spdlog: ${{ spdlog }}
  _tbb_devel: ${{ tbb_devel }}

recipe:
  name: ${{ name }}-split
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  - url: https://github.com/SarahWeiii/CoACD/archive/refs/tags/${{ version }}.zip
    sha256: c52b301d7ff86275eb00a7e635e0e19c2102157f1baf8dcd40b59a12d60a531b
    patches:
      - 01-add-missing-cstdint-include.patch
      - 02-fix-spdlog-v1-compatibility-and-constexpr.patch
      - 03-fix-missing-std-namespace-for-string.patch
      - 04-python-load-shared-library-from-system.patch
      - 05-python-setup.patch

  - url: https://github.com/artem-ogre/CDT/archive/refs/tags/${{ cdt_vendor_version }}.tar.gz
    sha256: 97e57bdd1cf8219dcc81634236a502390a20dda3599dd3414a74343b7f03427f
    target_directory: 3rd/cdt

  - path: CMakeLists.txt
    target_directory: .

build:
  number: ${{ build_number }}

outputs:
  # =====================
  # C++ library and C-API
  # =====================
  - package:
      name: libcoacd
    build:
      script:
        - if: unix
          then:
            - echo ${CMAKE_ARGS}
            - cmake -S . -B build -GNinja ${CMAKE_ARGS} -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON -DCMAKE_POLICY_DEFAULT_CMP0167=NEW
        - if: win
          then:
            - echo %CMAKE_ARGS%
            - cmake -S . -B build -GNinja %CMAKE_ARGS% -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON -DCMAKE_POLICY_DEFAULT_CMP0167=NEW
        - cmake --build build --config Release
        - cmake --install build --config Release
    requirements:
      build:
        - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('c') }}
        - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
        - cmake
        - make
        - ninja
        - pkg-config
      host:
        - zlib
        - libboost-python-devel
        - openvdb
        - tbb-devel
        - spdlog
        - eigen
        - fmt
      run:
        - ${{ pin_compatible('openvdb', upper_bound='x.x') }}
      run_exports:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage('libcoacd', upper_bound='x.x.x') }}
      ignore_run_exports:
        from_package:
          - libboost-python-devel
          - zlib
    tests:
      - script:
          - cmake-package-check coacd --targets CoACD::_coacd
        requirements:
          run:
            - ${{ compiler('c') }}
            - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
            - cmake-package-check
  # ==============
  # Python package
  # ==============
  - package:
      name: coacd
    build:
      noarch: python
      python:
        entry_points:
          - coacd=coacd.cli:main
      script:
        - if: unix
          then:
            - mv python/package/bin/coacd python/package/cli.py
        - if: win
          then:
            - move python\package\bin\coacd python\package\cli.py
        - python -m pip install . --no-deps -vv --no-build-isolation
    requirements:
      build:
      host:
        - pip
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
        - setuptools
      run:
        - ${{ pin_subpackage("libcoacd", exact=True) }}
        - numpy
        - python >=${{ python_min }}
    tests:
      - if: not linux or build_platform == target_platform
        then:
          - python:
              imports:
                - coacd
              pip_check: true
          - script:
              - coacd -i examples/Bottle.obj -o Bottle_cvx.gltf -t 0.05
              - python run_tests.py
            files:
              source:
                - examples/
                - run_tests.py
            requirements:
              run:
                - python 3.11.*
                - trimesh

about:
  homepage: https://colin97.github.io/CoACD
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_file:
    - LICENSE
    - 3rd/cdt/LICENSE
  repository: https://github.com/SarahWeiii/CoACD
  summary: Approximate Convex Decomposition for 3D Meshes with Collision-Aware Concavity and Tree Search

extra:
  feedstock-name: coacd
  recipe-maintainers:
    - diegoferigo

about.summary: Approximate Convex Decomposition for 3D Meshes with Collision-Aware Concavity and Tree Search
